# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-RLS-009](task-0054): Audit Trail

## Purpose

Create audit trail for releases.

## Scope

- Trail format
- Logging
- Retention

## Implementation

1. Define trail format
2. Implement logging
3. Set retention

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Trail format defined
2. Logging works
3. Retention set
